label: ILC2_3
resolved_names: group 2 and group 3 innate lymphoid cells
evidence: Reynolds 2021 main text identifies ILC1/3 and ILC2 as distinct clusters among adult skin innate lymphocytes: 'ILC2 (IL7R, PTGDR2, GATA3) has the most distinct signature in our data and in existing literature.' ILC2_3 in Gopee 2024 is a combined cluster encompassing both ILC2 and ILC1/3 (ILC3-containing) populations. This labeling reflects the grouping of IL7R+ innate lymphoid populations outside the ILC1/NK lineage.
